ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the site */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the site */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the site */,
  "grid_ref" TEXT /* Grid reference of the site */,
  "site_type" TEXT /* Type of site */,
  "site_area" REAL /* Area of the site in square kilometers or hectares */,
  "site_elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the site in meters above sea level */,
  "site_aspect" TEXT /* Aspect of the site */,
  "site_slope" REAL /* Slope of the site in degrees */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site where the sample was collected */,
  "study_name" TEXT /* Name of the study */,
  "expansion" TEXT /* Expansion name */,
  "ind_num_cont" INTEGER /* Individual number and container */,
  "sample_date" TEXT /* Date the sample was collected */,
  "sample_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the sample */,
  "sample_depth" REAL /* Depth of the sample in centimeters or meters */,
  "sample_volume" REAL /* Volume of the sample in liters or cubic meters */,
  "sample_weight" REAL /* Weight of the sample in grams or kilograms */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "photos" (
  "photo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each photo */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sample the photo belongs to */,
  "calib_group" TEXT /* Calibration group */,
  "calib_day" INTEGER /* Calibration day */,
  "calib_month" INTEGER /* Calibration month */,
  "scale_dmg" REAL /* Scale damage */,
  "photo_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the photo */,
  "photo_comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the photo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("photo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_photos_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "photo_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "photo_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the photo the file belongs to */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the file in bytes or megabytes */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_photo_files_photo_id FOREIGN KEY ("photo_id") REFERENCES photos ("photo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vegetation" (
  "veg_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vegetation record */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sample the vegetation data belongs to */,
  "dmg" INTEGER /* Damage level */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age */,
  "cropped" TEXT /* Cropped status */,
  "fw_used" TEXT /* Forward wheel used */,
  "hw_used" TEXT /* Hind wheel used */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Name of the species */,
  "species_code" TEXT /* Code for the species */,
  "vegetation_cover" REAL /* Percentage of vegetation cover */,
  "vegetation_height" REAL /* Height of the vegetation in centimeters or meters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("veg_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vegetation_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research project */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site the project is associated with */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "project_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "project_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "project_lead" TEXT /* Lead researcher or organization for the project */,
  "project_collaborators" TEXT /* Collaborators or partners for the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_projects_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)
